question_text: The police arrested four criminals – P, Q, R and S. The criminals knew each other. They made the following statements: P says “Q committed the crime.” Q says “S committed the crime.” R says “I did not do it.” S says “What Q said about me is false.”

options.A: ssume only one of the arrested four committed the crime and only one of the statements made above is true. Who committed the crime?
